attributes.description: Texmaco Rail & Engineering Ltd is an engineering infrastructure co. & part of the Adventz Group, The co. is involved in the business of manufacturing Rolling stock, hydro-mechanical equipment, steel castings & construction of Rail EPC, bridges, and other steel structures. [1] [2]

Texmaco Rail & Engineering Ltd is an engineering infrastructure co. & part of the Adventz Group, The co. is involved in the business of manufacturing Rolling stock, hydro-mechanical equipment, steel castings & construction of Rail EPC, bridges, and other steel structures. [1] [2]
